OpsBuddy
Operator Visit Guide
OpsBuddy is the upgraded maintenance platform for efficient visit completion.

Every visit — you ensure the unit is properly stocked, all rental items are checked,
supplies are counted, and any issues are reported directly inside the app
so the right team member can act on them immediately.

★
Getting Started
Access OpsBuddy from the Tulu App
Page 2

OpsBuddy is built into the Tulu app. Open the menu and tap the purple OpsBuddy button at the bottom to start your visit.

1
Open the Tulu app on your phone
2
Tap the menu icon (top left corner)
3
Scroll down — tap the purple OpsBuddy button
Download / Update the App
Download on theApp Store
Get it onGoogle Play
App Store: apps.apple.com/us/app/tulu-own-less-live-more/id1477180604
Google Play: play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tulou.app
⚠ IMPORTANT
Update the app BEFORE every visit — we release improvements regularly.
Choosing Your Building & View Remotely

Tap "Go to Schedule" to see assigned buildings. Select the one you plan to service. Tap "View Remotely" to preview the visit before arriving — deliveries, shop, rent, and checks.

👁 TIP
View Remotely is a preview only — actions are disabled until you start the real visit on-site.
OpsBuddy · Operator Visit Guide Internal Use Only · Tulu Operations
1
Check-In
Location verification & package receiving
Page 3

Goal: Confirm you're on-site and log all package arrivals accurately before moving to the next step.

1
Tap Verify My Location
2
Review packages in the Due and Upcoming tabs
3
Set the correct status for each package
Package Tabs
Due — packages with today's or past ETA
Upcoming — packages arriving in the future
Other / Unexpected Packages — add any surprise deliveries
Package Status — choose one per item
✗ Not Here — still awaiting, no issue
✓ Received [qty] — confirm count + expiry date if required
⚠ Issue — damaged / expired / wrong item / short quantity
💡 EXPIRY DATE TIP
If expiry date is not required for an item, enter any date in 2027. Will be improved in a future update.
📦 BACKROOM → UNIT (done in Shop step)
Received items go to the BACKROOM first — not the unit directly. In the next step (Shop), use '– / +' under 'Move from backroom' to physically transfer items into the unit.
OpsBuddy · Operator Visit Guide Internal Use Only · Tulu Operations
2
Shop Restock
Stock the unit and manage inventory
Page 4

Goal: Ensure all products are correctly stocked in the unit. Move items from the backroom into the right cells.

Categories: Beverages / Ice Cream / Snacks / Household, etc.

Key Controls
View Layout — shelf map showing where each item belongs and its cell number.
Open [Category] Door — unlocks all doors in that category at once.
Hide well-stocked items — toggle to focus only on what needs restocking.
📸 NO LAYOUT PHOTO? DO THIS:
If no layout photo is visible — take a fully-stocked shop photo at the end of your visit, mention it in the visit Survey, and contact Anastasia or Yussef via Slack. We will add it.
Stock Flow — How It Works
🔄 STOCK FLOW — READ CAREFULLY
Backroom → Unit

1. Items received in Check-In arrive in the BACKROOM.
2. Use '– / +' under 'Move from backroom' to transfer to the unit.
3. Use 'Adjust Stock' only to manually correct the unit count.
4. Out of Stock item? Tap 'Update Backroom Count' first, then move to the unit with '– / +'.
OpsBuddy · Operator Visit Guide Internal Use Only · Tulu Operations
3
Rental Checkups
Complete maintenance checklists for rental items
Page 5

Goal: Complete maintenance tasks for each rental item that has open tasks. Only items with assigned tasks need to be checked this visit.

1
Open each rental item with an open task
2
Read through each task carefully
3
Tap Valid or Not Valid for each task
4
Add required photos — do not skip
✓ Valid — task complete / item in good condition
✗ Not Valid — issue found, describe with full detail
🤖 AI FEATURE — SHARE ALL DETAILS
When reporting an issue, the AI agent will try to help resolve it immediately. For the best assistance, share:
· The exact rental item name and model
· What is happening (sounds, lights, error messages, etc.)
· What you already tried
If unresolved, the issue is automatically escalated to the right team member.
OpsBuddy · Operator Visit Guide Internal Use Only · Tulu Operations
4
Print Station
Verify the printer is operational
Page 6

Goal: Confirm the printer is working at every visit.

1
Tap Test Printer
2
Confirm a page physically prints out
3
If it fails — report as an issue with full details
When Reporting a Printer Issue, Include:
Any error lights or messages on the printer
Whether it powers on at all
Paper jam, connectivity issue, or ink error
🖨 NOTE
Always physically verify a page prints — do not assume it works.
OpsBuddy · Operator Visit Guide Internal Use Only · Tulu Operations
5
Checks
Unit & backroom condition verification
Page 7

Goal: Verify the full condition of the unit and backroom. Complete all tasks and take required photos.

4 Sub-Sections
Unit Checks — regular and deep clean tasks for the unit.
Backroom Checks — verify backroom organisation and condition.
Custom Tasks — tasks flagged for extra attention at this specific unit.
Go through every task. If unable to complete, report via AI assistance with full details.
Accessories (Supplies) — count all supplies in unit and backroom.
Enter exact quantity for each item and tap Confirm.
For items not yet counted, tap Add Count.
🛒 AUTO-REORDER
Procurement automatically reorders supplies when stock is low — no manual requests needed. Just enter accurate counts.

Take all required photos before tapping Next.

⚠ NEXT BUTTON BLOCKED?
If Next is greyed out, you have incomplete tasks in Rent or Checks. Any section shown in white still needs to be finished. Go back and complete all open tasks first.
OpsBuddy · Operator Visit Guide Internal Use Only · Tulu Operations
6
Summary & Feedback
Review your visit and check out
Page 8

The Visit Summary gives a full recap of your visit before checking out.

Review Before Completing
Time spent vs. estimated visit time
Shop Restock — products and total items added
Print Station — ink and paper verification status
Rental Checkups — tasks completed

Add any additional comments in the notes field — optional but appreciated.

Tap "Complete Visit" to finish. Your location will be verified at checkout.

Visit Feedback

After completing, you'll be asked to rate each section. Please take 30 seconds — your feedback directly improves the platform.

Rate: Check-in, Shop Restock, Rental Checkups, and Checks
Leave a star rating, voice note, or quick Good / Okay / Bad per section
⭐ YOUR FEEDBACK MATTERS
Your input is genuinely valuable — the platform grows with your feedback! Tap Skip if you're short on time.
